import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')
import inspect
import torch
import numpy as np
from tsr.utils import get_spherical_cameras, get_ray_directions, get_rays
import torch.nn.functional as F

# 1. Read source of get_spherical_cameras
from tsr.utils import get_spherical_cameras
src = inspect.getsource(get_spherical_cameras)
print('=== get_spherical_cameras source ===')
print(src)

# 2. Define both conventions
def convention_a(azimuth_deg, elevation_deg, distance):
    """Pipeline convention: x=cos(e)cos(a), y=cos(e)sin(a), z=sin(e); up=[0,0,1]"""
    elevation = np.deg2rad(elevation_deg)
    azimuth = np.deg2rad(azimuth_deg)
    cam_pos = np.array([
        distance * np.cos(elevation) * np.cos(azimuth),
        distance * np.cos(elevation) * np.sin(azimuth),
        distance * np.sin(elevation),
    ])
    center = np.zeros(3)
    up = np.array([0, 0, 1])
    lookat = center - cam_pos
    lookat = lookat / np.linalg.norm(lookat)
    right = np.cross(lookat, up)
    right = right / (np.linalg.norm(right) + 1e-8)
    up = np.cross(right, lookat)
    up = up / (np.linalg.norm(up) + 1e-8)
    R = np.stack([right, up, -lookat], axis=1)  # 3x3
    c2w = np.eye(4, dtype=np.float32)
    c2w[:3, :3] = R
    c2w[:3, 3] = cam_pos
    return torch.from_numpy(c2w).unsqueeze(0)

def convention_b(azimuth_deg, elevation_deg, distance):
    """Render convention: x=cos(e)sin(a), y=sin(e), z=cos(e)cos(a); up=[0,1,0]"""
    elevation = np.deg2rad(elevation_deg)
    azimuth = np.deg2rad(azimuth_deg)
    cam_pos = np.array([
        distance * np.cos(elevation) * np.sin(azimuth),
        distance * np.sin(elevation),
        distance * np.cos(elevation) * np.cos(azimuth),
    ])
    forward = -cam_pos / np.linalg.norm(cam_pos)
    right = np.cross(forward, np.array([0, 1, 0]))
    right = right / (np.linalg.norm(right) + 1e-8)
    up = np.cross(right, forward)
    up = up / (np.linalg.norm(up) + 1e-8)
    R = np.stack([right, up, -forward], axis=0)  # 3x3
    c2w = np.eye(4, dtype=np.float32)
    c2w[:3, :3] = R
    c2w[:3, 3] = cam_pos
    return torch.from_numpy(c2w).unsqueeze(0)

# 3. Compare against get_spherical_cameras for same params
azimuth_deg = 30.0
elevation_deg = 20.0
distance = 1.5
fovy_deg = 40.0
H, W = 256, 256

gt_rays_o, gt_rays_d = get_spherical_cameras(1, elevation_deg, distance, fovy_deg, H, W)
print('\nGT rays_o shape:', gt_rays_o.shape, 'rays_d shape:', gt_rays_d.shape)
print('GT rays_o[0,128,128]:', gt_rays_o[0, 128, 128].numpy())
print('GT rays_d[0,128,128]:', gt_rays_d[0, 128, 128].numpy())

def rays_from_c2w(c2w, fovy_deg, H, W):
    focal_length = 0.5 * H / np.tan(np.deg2rad(fovy_deg) / 2)
    directions_unit_focal = get_ray_directions(H=H, W=W, focal=1.0)
    directions = directions_unit_focal[None, :, :, :].clone()
    directions[:, :, :, :2] = directions[:, :, :, :2] / focal_length
    rays_o, rays_d = get_rays(directions, c2w, keepdim=True, normalize=True)
    return rays_o, rays_d

c2w_a = convention_a(azimuth_deg, elevation_deg, distance)
c2w_b = convention_b(azimuth_deg, elevation_deg, distance)

rays_o_a, rays_d_a = rays_from_c2w(c2w_a, fovy_deg, H, W)
rays_o_b, rays_d_b = rays_from_c2w(c2w_b, fovy_deg, H, W)

print('\nConv A rays_o[0,128,128]:', rays_o_a[0, 128, 128].numpy(), 'diff:', np.abs(rays_o_a[0,128,128].numpy() - gt_rays_o[0,128,128].numpy()).sum())
print('Conv A rays_d[0,128,128]:', rays_d_a[0, 128, 128].numpy(), 'diff:', np.abs(rays_d_a[0,128,128].numpy() - gt_rays_d[0,128,128].numpy()).sum())
print('\nConv B rays_o[0,128,128]:', rays_o_b[0, 128, 128].numpy(), 'diff:', np.abs(rays_o_b[0,128,128].numpy() - gt_rays_o[0,128,128].numpy()).sum())
print('Conv B rays_d[0,128,128]:', rays_d_b[0, 128, 128].numpy(), 'diff:', np.abs(rays_d_b[0,128,128].numpy() - gt_rays_d[0,128,128].numpy()).sum())

# Also test visual render with model to see which matches default
device = 'cuda'
from tsr.system import TSR
from PIL import Image
import os
model = TSR.from_pretrained('/models/triposr', config_name='config.yaml', weight_name='model.ckpt')
model.renderer.set_chunk_size(131072)
model.to(device)

sample_obj = '0000ecca9a234cae994be239f6fec552'
obj_dir = os.path.join(os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR','/data'), 'train', sample_obj)
input_img = Image.open(os.path.join(obj_dir, 'input.png')).convert('RGB')
scene_codes = model([input_img], device=device)

# Default render with get_spherical_cameras params matching our test
default = model.render(scene_codes, n_views=1, elevation_deg=elevation_deg, camera_distance=distance, fovy_deg=fovy_deg, height=H, width=W, return_type='pt')
print('\nDefault render shape:', default[0][0].shape)

# Custom render A
with torch.no_grad():
    out_a = model.renderer(model.decoder, scene_codes[0], rays_o_a.reshape(1, -1, 3).to(device), rays_d_a.reshape(1, -1, 3).to(device))
out_a = out_a.reshape(H, W, 3).cpu()

# Custom render B
with torch.no_grad():
    out_b = model.renderer(model.decoder, scene_codes[0], rays_o_b.reshape(1, -1, 3).to(device), rays_d_b.reshape(1, -1, 3).to(device))
out_b = out_b.reshape(H, W, 3).cpu()

# Compare
default_img = default[0][0].permute(1,2,0).cpu()
print('MSE A vs default:', ((out_a - default_img)**2).mean().item())
print('MSE B vs default:', ((out_b - default_img)**2).mean().item())

# Save all three for inspection
os.makedirs('convention_test', exist_ok=True)
Image.fromarray((default_img.numpy()*255).astype(np.uint8)).save('convention_test/default.png')
Image.fromarray((out_a.numpy()*255).astype(np.uint8)).save('convention_test/a.png')
Image.fromarray((out_b.numpy()*255).astype(np.uint8)).save('convention_test/b.png')
print('Saved images to convention_test/')
